KeY 2.6.2_00c1abfd22b738afe24e89fecc2ee4eec2c38f4a

de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Class Recoder2KeYConverter

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.Recoder2KeYConverter
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    SchemaRecoder2KeYConverter

    public class Recoder2KeYConverter
extends Object
    Objects of this class can be used to transform an AST returned by the recoder library to the corresponding yet immutable KeY data structures. Call the method process() to convert an arbitrary object. The method callConvert is used to perform a run-time dispatch upon the parameters. The actual conversion is done in convert-methods which must be declared public due to the used reflection method lookup function. There is a general method callConvert(recoder.java.ProgramElement) that does the job in general. Several special cases must be treated separately. This code used to be part of Recoder2KeY and has been 'out-sourced'.
    Since:
    Jul-07
    Author:
    mattias ulbrich

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private HashMap<Class<? extends JavaProgramElement>,Constructor<?>> constructorCache
      caches constructor access for reflection.
      private String currentClass
      stores the class that is currently processed
      private HashMap<FieldSpecification,ProgramVariable> fieldSpecificationMapping
      Hashmap from recoder.java.declaration.FieldSpecification to ProgramVariable; this is necessary to avoid cycles when converting initializers.
      private boolean inLoopInit
      flag which is true if currently in a for initialiser or update
      protected HashMap<?,?> locClass2finalVar
      locClass2finalVar stores the final variables that need to be passed to the constructor of an anonymous class.
      private HashMap<Class<?>,Method> methodCache
      caches access to methods for reflection.
      private HashMap<MethodDeclaration,IProgramMethod> methodsDeclaring
      methodsDeclaring contains the recoder method declarations as keys that have been started to convert but are not yet finished.
      private NamespaceSet namespaceSet
      The namespaces are here to provide some conversion functions access to previously defined logical symbols.
      private Recoder2KeY rec2key
      the associated Recoder2KeY object
      private static int RECODER_PREFIX_LENGTH 
      private Services services

      convert a recoder ProgramElement to a corresponding KeY data structure entity.

    • Field Detail

      • services

        private final Services services

      • methodCache

        private final HashMap<Class<?>,Method> methodCache
        caches access to methods for reflection. It is a HashMap

      • constructorCache

        private final HashMap<Class<? extends JavaProgramElement>,Constructor<?>> constructorCache
        caches constructor access for reflection. It is a HashMap

      • fieldSpecificationMapping

        private HashMap<FieldSpecification,ProgramVariable> fieldSpecificationMapping
        Hashmap from recoder.java.declaration.FieldSpecification to ProgramVariable; this is necessary to avoid cycles when converting initializers. Access to this map is performed via the method getProgramVariableForFieldSpecification

      • methodsDeclaring

        private HashMap<MethodDeclaration,IProgramMethod> methodsDeclaring
        methodsDeclaring contains the recoder method declarations as keys that have been started to convert but are not yet finished. The mapped value is the reference to the later completed IProgramMethod.

      • locClass2finalVar

        protected HashMap<?,?> locClass2finalVar
        locClass2finalVar stores the final variables that need to be passed to the constructor of an anonymous class.

      • currentClass

        private String currentClass
        stores the class that is currently processed

      • inLoopInit

        private boolean inLoopInit
        flag which is true if currently in a for initialiser or update

      • rec2key

        private Recoder2KeY rec2key
        the associated Recoder2KeY object

      • namespaceSet

        private final NamespaceSet namespaceSet
        The namespaces are here to provide some conversion functions access to previously defined logical symbols.

      • RECODER_PREFIX_LENGTH

        private static int RECODER_PREFIX_LENGTH

                    NamespaceSet nss)

      • process

      • getKeYJavaType

        private KeYJavaType getKeYJavaType(Type javaType)
        retrieve a key type using the converter available from Recoder2KeY
        Parameters:
        javaType - type to look up
        Returns:
        the result from the type converter

      • getTypeConverter

        private Recoder2KeYTypeConverter getTypeConverter()
        retrieve the type converter from the associated Recoder2KeY
        Returns:
        the type converter, not null.

      • getServiceConfiguration

        private CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration getServiceConfiguration()
        retrieve the service configuration from the associated Recoder2KeY.
        Returns:
        the service configuration, not null.

      • getMapping

        protected KeYRecoderMapping getMapping()
        retrieve the recoder<->key mapping from the associated Recoder2KeY.
        Returns:
        the mapping, not null.

      • isParsingLibs

        private boolean isParsingLibs()
        are we currently parsing library code? Ask the associated Recoder2KeY
        Returns:
        true if libs are parsed at the moment
        See Also:
        Recoder2KeY.isParsingLibs()

      • callConvert

        protected Object callConvert(ProgramElement pe)
                      throws ConvertException
        convert a recoder ProgramElement to a corresponding KeY data structure entity. Almost always the returned type carries the same Classname but in a KeY rather than a recoder package. Determines the right convert method using reflection
        Parameters:
        pe - the recoder.java.JavaProgramElement to be converted, not null.
        Returns:
        the converted element
        Throws:
        ConvertException - if the conversion fails

      • collectChildren

        protected ExtList collectChildren(NonTerminalProgramElement pe)
        iterate over all children and call convert upon them. Gather the resulting KeY structures in an ExtList. In addition to the child ast-branches, all comments are gathered also.
        Parameters:
        pe - the NonTerminalProgramElement that needs its children before being converted
        Returns:
        the list of children after conversion

      • makeAdmissibleName

        static String makeAdmissibleName(String s)
        replace some numbers from anonymous class names. needed by the translation of anonymous classes.

      • collectComments

        private ExtList collectComments(ProgramElement pe)
        collects comments and adds their converted KeY-counterpart to the list of children
        Parameters:
        pe - the ProgramElement that needs its comments before being converted
        Returns:
        the list of comments after conversion

      • collectChildrenAndComments

        private ExtList collectChildrenAndComments(ProgramElement pe)
        collects both comments and children of a program element
        Parameters:
        pe - program element
        Returns:
        freshly created list of children after conversion and converted comments

      • positionInfo

        private PositionInfo positionInfo(SourceElement se)
        convert recoder position info to key position info
        Parameters:
        se - the sourcelement to extract from, not null
        Returns:
        the newly created PositionInfo

      • getLiteralFor

        private Literal getLiteralFor(ConstantEvaluator.EvaluationResult p_er)
        Returns:
        a literal constant representing the value of p_er

      • filterField

        private ImmutableList<Field> filterField(FieldDeclaration field)
        extracts all fields out of fielddeclaration
        Parameters:
        field - the FieldDeclaration of which the field specifications have to be extracted
        Returns:
        a IList the includes all field specifications found int the field declaration of the given list

      • find

        private ProgramVariable find(String name,
                   ImmutableList<Field> fields)
        retrieves a field with the given name out of the list
        Parameters:
        name - a String with the name of the field to be looked for
        fields - the IList where we have to look for the field
        Returns:
        the program variable of the given name or null if not found

      • convert

        public ProgramElement convert(JavaProgramElement pe)
        The default procedure. It iterates over all children, calls convert upon them collect all children, convert them. Create a new instance of the corresponding KeY class and call its constructor with the list of children.
        Parameters:
        pe - the recoder.java.ProgramElement to be converted
        Returns:
        the converted de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement, null if there has been an exception

      • getKeYClass

        private Class<?> getKeYClass(Class<? extends JavaProgramElement> recoderClass)
        gets the KeY-Class related to the recoder one
        Parameters:
        recoderClass - the original Class within recoder
        Returns:
        the related KeY Class
        Throws:
        ConvertException - for various reasons

      • getKeYName

        private String getKeYName(Class<? extends JavaProgramElement> recoderClass)
        constructs the name of the corresponding KeYClass. Expected prefixes are either recoder or ...key.java.recoderext
        Parameters:
        recoderClass - Class that is the original recoder
        Returns:
        String containing the KeY-Classname

      • getKeYClassConstructor

        private Constructor<?> getKeYClassConstructor(Class<? extends JavaProgramElement> recoderClass)
        determines the right standard constructor of the KeYClass. Use a cache to only look up classes once.
        Parameters:
        recoderClass - the Class of the recoder AST object
        Returns:
        the Constructor of the right KeY-Class

      • insertToMap

        protected void insertToMap(ModelElement r,
               ModelElement k)
        store an element to the recoder<->key mapping.
        Parameters:
        r - the recoder element (not null)
        k - the key element (not null)

      • convert

        public EnumClassDeclaration convert(EnumClassDeclaration td)
        convert a recoder EnumDeclaration to a KeY EnumClassDeclaration. Enums have already been mapped to classes at an earlier stage

        public ParameterDeclaration convert(ParameterDeclaration pd)
        converts a recoder ParameterDeclaration to a KeY ParameterDeclaration (especially the declaration type of its parent is determined and handed over)

        convert a recoder FieldDeclaration to a KeY FieldDeclaration (especially the declaration type of its parent is determined and handed over)

        public TypeCast convert(TypeCast c)
        convert a recoder type cast to a KeY TypeCast

      • convert

        public SuperConstructorReference convert(SuperConstructorReference scr)
        converts a SpecialConstructorReference. Special handling because the initializing Expressions and the ReferencePrefix accessPath might not be disjunct.

      • convert

        public ThisReference convert(ThisReference tr)
        Convert a this referene. Special handling because the initializing Expressions and the ReferencePrefix accessPath might not be disjunct.

      • convert

        public SuperReference convert(SuperReference sr)
        Convert a super referene. Special handling because the initializing Expressions and the ReferencePrefix accessPath might not be disjunct.

        public VariableSpecification convert(VariableSpecification recoderVarSpec)
        convert a recoder VariableSpecification to a KeY VariableSpecification (checks dimension and hands it over and insert in hashmap)

        public FieldSpecification convert(FieldSpecification recoderVarSpec)

      • getProgramVariableForFieldSpecification

        private ProgramVariable getProgramVariableForFieldSpecification(FieldSpecification recoderVarSpec)
        this is needed by #convert(FieldSpecification).

      • getCompileTimeConstantInitializer

        private Literal getCompileTimeConstantInitializer(FieldSpecification recoderVarSpec)
        needed by getProgramVariableForFieldSpecification(recoder.java.declaration.FieldSpecification).
        Returns:
        a literal constant representing the value of the initializer of recoderVarSpec, if the variable is a compile-time constant, and null otherwise

      • convert

        public TypeReference convert(TypeReference tr)
        convert a recoder TypeReference to a KeY TypeReference (checks dimension and hands it over)

      • convert

        public ProgramElement convert(UncollatedReferenceQualifier urq)
        if an UncollatedReferenceQualifier appears throw a ConvertExceception because these qualifiers have to be resolved by running the CrossReferencer

      • getRecoderVarSpec

        private VariableSpecification getRecoderVarSpec(VariableReference vr)
        this is needed to convert variable references

      • convert

        public ProgramVariable convert(VariableReference vr)
        converts a recoder variable reference. A ProgramVariable is created replacing the variable reference.
        Parameters:
        vr - the recoder variable reference.

      • convert

        public FieldReference convert(ArrayLengthReference alr)
        converts a recoder array length reference to a usual KeY field reference

      • convert

        public Expression convert(FieldReference fr)
        converts a recoder field reference. A ProgramVariable is created replacing the field reference.
        Parameters:
        fr - the recoder field reference.

      • convert

        public MethodReference convert(MethodReference mr)
        converts a recoder method reference. A de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.ProgramMethod is created replacing the method reference.
        Parameters:
        mr - the recoder method reference.
        Returns:
        the Method the KeY Dependance

      • convert

        public LabeledStatement convert(LabeledStatement l)
        convert a labeled statement. Remove the label from the set of children and pass it separately.

      • convert

        public For convert(For f)
        converts a For.
        Parameters:
        f - the For of recoder
        Returns:
        the For of KeY

      • convert

        public AnnotationUseSpecification convert(AnnotationUseSpecification aus)

      • convert

        public EnhancedFor convert(EnhancedFor f)
        converts a java5-enhanced-for.
        Parameters:
        f - the EnhancedFor of recoder
        Returns:
        the EnhancedFor of KeY

      • convert

        public While convert(While w)
        converts a While.
        Parameters:
        w - the While of recoder
        Returns:
        the While of KeY

      • convert

        public Do convert(Do d)
        converts a Do.
        Parameters:
        d - the Do of recoder
        Returns:
        the Do of KeY

      • convertBody

        public Statement convertBody(LoopStatement ls)
        helper for convert(x) with x a LoopStatement. Converts the body of x.

      • convertGuard

        public Guard convertGuard(LoopStatement ls)
        helper for convert(x) with x a LoopStatement. Converts the guard of x.

      • convertUpdates

        public ForUpdates convertUpdates(LoopStatement ls)
        helper for convert(x) with x a LoopStatement. Converts the updates of x.

      • convertLoopInitializers

        public LoopInit convertLoopInitializers(LoopStatement ls)
        helper for convert(x) with x a LoopStatement. Converts the loop initializers of x.

      • convert

        public ArrayReference convert(ArrayReference ar)
        converts an ArrayReference. Special handling because the initializing Expressions and the ReferencePrefix accessPath might not be disjunct.

      • convert

        public Assert convert(Assert a)
        convert Assert

      • convert

        public Case convert(Case c)
        converts a Case. Special handling because the initializing Expression and Statements might not be disjunct.

      • convert

        public New convert(New n)
        converts a New. Special handling because the ReferencePrefix and the TypeReference might not be disjunct.

      • convert

        public Import convert(Import im)

      • convert

        public StatementBlock convert(StatementBlock block)
        convert a statement block and remove all included anonymous classes.
        Parameters:
        block - the recoder.java.StatementBlock to be converted
        Returns:
        the converted StatementBlock
